title: lanonia gracilis
intro: Lanonia gracilis, also known as the pink shower tree, is a flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, and its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and saponins. The health benefits of Lanonia gracilis include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as tea infusions, decoctions, and infusions of the flowers and leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
